embeds.description:
# [BebraLand Rules](https://bebraland.auuruum.me/wiki/rules/rules)
BebraLand keeps rules simple: enjoy the server, use common sense, and don't ruin the experience for other players.

The website is the official source of truth for the full rules.

fields.name: Zero tolerance
fields.value:
- Cheating, X-ray, cheat clients, or malicious exploits
- Intentional lag machines or harmful redstone
- Malicious griefing: joining to destroy other people's work
- Intentional Twitch-ban bait, NSFW/porn, shock content, or WebDisplays abuse

fields.name: Gameplay
fields.value:
- Light pranks are fine; stealing or destroying progress is not
- PvP only by mutual consent or during events
- Item duplication is banned, except TNT duplicators for farms/bores
- Respect your neighbours: don't build a giant ugly thing next to someone's cozy base without asking
- Items lost on normal deaths are not returned by moderation

fields.name: Community vibe
fields.value:
- Friendly banter is fine; bullying is not
- Slurs, hate speech, extremist symbols, illegal content, NSFW, and shock content are prohibited
- LT / EN / RU are allowed; English is the bridge when groups are mixed
- BebraLand is private: if you invite someone, you vouch for them
